creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks.  Your patch was kind of screwed up, it made a 
new file "files-aa" that I didn't notice until the end. The only 
difference (with patch-aa) I saw was the install-gtk target, so I 
ended up ignoring this file and removing the install-gtk target. 
Also, I added in a perl regex to use ${GTK_CONFIG}, this fixed 
the build for me.
